name: THE BRIGHTON FLOWER COMPANY
subtitle: Florist · Flower Studio
tagline: Seasonal, British-grown flowers arranged with a light touch — weddings, events, and the bunch you grab on the way home.
pageTitle: THE BRIGHTON FLOWER COMPANY — Florist in Brighton

services.name: Bouquets & Bunches
services.desc: Hand-tied seasonal bouquets, from a quick thank-you to a full birthday statement.

services.name: Weddings
services.desc: Bespoke bridal bouquets, table arrangements and archways. We handle the whole day.

services.name: Events & Corporate
services.desc: Weekly office flowers, launches, and dinner-party centrepieces across Brighton.

services.name: Subscriptions
services.desc: A fresh bunch delivered weekly or fortnightly — the gift that keeps arriving.

services.name: Funerals & Sympathy
services.desc: Considered, respectful arrangements and wreaths, delivered with care.

services.name: Workshops
services.desc: Seasonal flower-school sessions in the studio. Dates on our socials.

about.title: Grown here, arranged with care.
paragraphs: The Brighton Flower Company started from a market stall and a van full of buckets. Today it’s a studio working mostly with British growers.
We’re foam-free and as local as the season allows — no air-freighted roses, no plastic, just flowers that were in a field yesterday.
Every arrangement is made by hand by the same people who’ll answer your email. That’s the whole business.

whyChoose.text: British-grown, seasonal — no air-freighted flowers, ever
Foam-free & plastic-free — kinder to the flowers and the planet
Independent studio — made by the people who answer your email
280+ five-star reviews — see what Brighton says on Google

reviews.text: My wedding flowers were beyond anything I'd pictured. Guests are still talking about them.

reviews.text: Weekly subscription for the office — genuinely the highlight of everyone's Tuesday.

reviews.name: Nadia R.
reviews.text: Sympathy wreath handled with such care during a hard week. Thank you.
